_comment: CONTRACTS — the 'definition of correct' per Recruiter workflow, read by the AI failure-diagnosis (self_healing_service). Derived from extension/runtime-strategies/recruiter.mjs `stageVerdict` (the live postconditions + failure reasons), the spec `description`/`intent` fields, and CLAUDE.md. Keyed by the recruiter strategy. The diagnosis also gets a per-run `event_kind` to disambiguate strategies that serve >1 stage (recruiter_search_people).
_offline_validation_rule: A proposed selector_swap is only trustworthy if the new selector string appears in the captured evidence (the strategy's diag DOM fragments + page snapshot visible_elements). Prefer data-test-* selectors; never ES/EN words (the /talent seat language flips ES<->EN).

recruiter_search_people.intent: Run the boolean + location search and extract candidate cards (or, for create-project, land on the new project workspace).
recruiter_search_people.success_criteria: create_project: URL matches /talent/hire/<id> (landed on the project). search: a total_count was read (even 0) OR cards were collected.

failure_reasons.project_not_created: Did not land on /talent/hire/<id> — the create-project step didn't commit.
failure_reasons.search_results_did_not_render: No count read AND no cards — usually a walled seat (login/checkpoint) or the results selector drifted.

recruiter_search_people.known_gotchas: Locale-proof selectors only (data-test-facet-*). A walled /talent seat 'succeeds' with 0 candidates — that's a wall, not an empty search.

recruiter_save_results_to_project.intent: Select N results on the search-results page and bulk-save them to the project.

failure_reasons.save_selected_none: Nothing was saved — the select-all or Save button selector likely drifted, or the project typeahead matched the wrong/no project.
failure_reasons.save_unverified_zero: Saved click happened but the project's candidate count is demonstrably 0 — the save didn't persist.

recruiter_save_results_to_project.known_gotchas: The save typeahead lists ALL projects (can pick the WRONG one); selection resets on pagination (save per page).

recruiter_archive_candidate.intent: Archive (remove) one candidate from a project by name and verify they left the active list.

failure_reasons.archive_not_verified: The per-row archive button (data-test-component=archive-profiles-btn) or the confirm modal submit drifted, or the archived counter didn't increase. Row actions are hidden until the row is HOVERED.

recruiter_archive_candidate.known_gotchas: Hover the row first; submit is in the modal footer (data-test-archive-confirm-modal-submit).

recruiter_archive_all_in_project.intent: Loop the single-archive over the first active candidate until the active count hits 0.

failure_reasons.archive_all_no_progress: No candidate was archived in the round — same selectors as recruiter_archive_candidate.

recruiter_save_recommendations.intent: Add a project's LinkedIn Recommended matches (Automated Sourcing) to the pipeline.

failure_reasons.recommendations_none: No recommendation was added — the per-row data-test-save-to-first-stage (hover-gated) drifted, or the surface is /automatedSourcing/review not /recommendedMatches.

recruiter_add_profile.intent: Add a public /in/ or /talent/profile/ candidate to a project (bridge to the Recruiter profile, Save-to-project).

failure_reasons.add_profile_failed: The /in/ bridge to the Recruiter profile or the Save-to-project button drifted.

recruiter_message_compose.intent: Bulk-InMail the project's active candidates from a template ({Nombre} -> {firstName} chip), gated by `send`.
recruiter_message_compose.success_criteria: message_compose_result.ok (gated preview OR a real send that delivered).

failure_reasons.rate_limited_24h: LinkedIn won't contact the same person twice within 24h — the Send button is disabled.
failure_reasons.send_button_disabled: Send is greyed out for another reason.
failure_reasons.composer_open_failed: The Message button (data-test-action=send-message) or the composer editor drifted.

recruiter_note_compose.intent: Add a 'Contactado para <posición>' note (bulk) to the project's active candidates and move them to the native 'contacted' stage. Paginates across pages. Gated by `save` (false=preview, true=save+move).
recruiter_note_compose.success_criteria: note_compose_result.ok. save=false (preview) always ok; save=true gates on whether the note actually persisted (success toast 'Se ha añadido una nota a N candidatos').

failure_reasons.note_failed: The bulk add-note flow failed to persist.
failure_reasons.note_save_unverified: Clicked 'Añadir' but no success toast/modal-close — the submit button (data-test-create-edit-note-submit-btn) or the textarea (data-test-mentions-edit-textarea) drifted.

recruiter_note_compose.known_gotchas: add-note lives in the collapsible-toolbar OVERFLOW ('Más elementos', button.collapsible-toolbar__dropdown-trigger); there are TWO add-note buttons (hidden original + visible dropdown clone) — click the visible one. No across-pages select -> paginate (data-test-pagination-next).

recruiter_archive_project.success_criteria: archive_project_result.ok (gone from the active projects list).

failure_reasons.archive_project_failed: The project overflow menu / 'Archive project' confirm drifted.

_generic_step.intent: A generic navigate/click/type step driven by the daemon's literal executor (no recruiter strategy). Used by simple/probe workflows and fault-injection tests.
_generic_step.success_criteria: The step's selector_chain resolves to a visible element and the action completes; checkpoint:true steps HARD-FAIL the run when the target is missing.

failure_reasons.selector_not_resolved: The selector_chain matched no element within the resolve timeout — almost always selector drift or a locale-dependent text/aria selector that flipped ES<->EN.
failure_reasons.checkpoint_failed: A checkpoint:true step's target was missing.

_generic_step.known_gotchas: Prefer data-test-* CSS over text/aria (the /talent seat language flips). A failing click/type step is the canonical selector-drift case.
